files.name: SKILL.md
files.content:
# SKILL.md - Dental AI Receptionist Builder

## Description

Build a production-ready AI voice receptionist that answers calls for dental practices 24/7. Complete tech stack, conversation flows, and outreach templates.

## Prerequisites

- Vapi account (https://vapi.ai)
- Twilio account with A2P 10DLC registration
- OpenAI API key (or compatible LLM)
- Notion or Airtable for lead/data capture
- Domain for phone number (optional)

## Setup

1. Create Vapi account and get API key
2. Set up Twilio and register for A2P 10DLC
3. Create assistant in Vapi with the conversation flow below
4. Configure Twilio to route to Vapi
5. Test with test calls
6. Deploy for client

## Commands

- "Set up dental AI receptionist"
- "Create dental call flow"
- "Build dental outreach campaign"
- "Calculate dental ROI"
- "Write dental proposal"

## Conversation Flow Template

### Opening
"Thanks for calling [Practice Name]. This is [AI Name], the virtual receptionist. How can I help you today?"

### Intent Detection
- New patient inquiry
- Existing patient appointment
- Existing patient question
- Insurance question
- Emergency
- Other

### New Patient Flow
1. Collect: Name, Phone, Email
2. Collect: Reason for visit
3. Collect: Insurance provider
4. Collect: Preferred appointment time
5. Summarize and confirm
6. "I'll have our team contact you within 2 hours to confirm your appointment."

### Existing Patient Flow
1. Verify: Date of birth
2. Pull patient record
3. Handle request (appointment, question, prescription, etc.)
4. Confirm next steps

### Emergency Keywords
- Toothache
- Pain
- Bleeding
- Broken
- Lost crown
- Knocked out
- Emergency
- Urgent

When emergency detected: "I'm connecting you with our on-call dentist right away" -> transfer to emergency line

### Insurance Verification
Collect: Insurance provider, Member ID, Group Number
Flag for staff review, send notification

### After Hours
"We're currently closed. For emergencies, please call [emergency number]. Otherwise, leave a message and we'll return your call tomorrow morning."

## Tech Stack Configuration

### Vapi Settings
- Model: GPT-4o-mini (cost optimization) or GPT-4o (higher quality)
- Voice: alloy, echo, or nova
- End-of-speech-timeout: 500ms
- Attention-keywords: [dentist, doctor, emergency, pain, crown, filling, cleaning, x-ray, whitening]

### Twilio Configuration
- Buy phone number in area code matching client
- Enable A2P 10DLC (required for mass calling)
- Configure voice URL to Vapi webhook
- Set up voicemail detection

### Cost Estimation (per client)
| Item | Cost |
|------|------|
| Vapi voice | $0.40/min |
| Twilio number | $1.00/mo |
| Twilio calls | $0.01/min incoming |
| AI (GPT-4o-mini) | ~$0.003/call |
| **Total COGS** | **$65-125/mo** |

## Outreach Templates

### Cold Email - Email 1
Subject: Stop missing calls? 

Hi [Name],

I noticed [Practice Name] is missing calls during busy hours. Most dental offices we work with miss 15-30 calls monthly — each one potentially $500-$1,500 in lost revenue.

We built an AI receptionist that:
- Answers 24/7 (including after hours)
- Books appointments directly
- Handles insurance questions
- Routes emergencies to your on-call dentist

Would you be open to a 10-minute call to see if it makes sense for your practice?

Geele Evans
Borne Systems

### Cold Email - Follow Up (3 days later)
Subject: Quick question on your front desk

Hi [Name],

Following up on my last email — just wanted to see if you had a chance to think about your front desk coverage.

One thing most dentists tell us: they didn't realize how many calls they were missing until they tracked it.

Happy to send over a quick call recording from a similar practice if helpful.

Best,
Geele

### LinkedIn Message
Hi [Name], saw your post about [practice topic] — really well said.

Question: how does [Practice Name] handle after-hours calls? We work with dental offices on AI receptionists that answer 24/7 — might be worth a quick chat if you're short-staffed on the front desk.

No pressure either way — just curious how you're handling it.

Best,
Geele

### Cold Call Opener
"Hi, this is Geele with Borne Systems. I'm not trying to sell you anything — I wanted to ask: how do you handle calls when you're with a patient? Do you miss many calls?"

(If yes) "We've helped [number] dental offices with AI receptionists that answer 24/7. Do you have 5 minutes to hear how it works?"

## Proposal Template

### Dental AI Receptionist — Proposal for [Practice Name]

#### The Problem
- Missing calls during patient treatment
- No coverage after hours or weekends
- Staff time wasted on repetitive questions
- Insurance verification delays

#### Our Solution
AI-powered virtual receptionist available 24/7/365

#### Pricing
| Tier | Features | Price |
|------|----------|-------|
| Basic | 24/7 answering, voicemail capture | $297/mo |
| Standard | + appointment booking | $397/mo |
| Premium | + insurance verification, emergencies | $497/mo |

#### Setup Fee
$497 one-time (includes configuration, testing, training)

#### ROI Example
- 20 missed calls/month × $750 avg = $15,000 lost revenue
- Our service: $297/mo = 50x ROI

#### Next Steps
1. Sign agreement
2. We configure your AI receptionist (5-7 days)
3. Test and launch
4. You start capturing missed revenue

---

Borne Systems — AI automation for local businesses
geele@bornesystems.com
